title: About IRCC settlement and resettlement services - Canada.ca
content:
## About IRCC settlement and resettlement services
Learn how settlement and resettlement programs are delivered, access the latest funding opportunities and review our latest reports and research.
- Settlement Program and Resettlement Program: Call for Proposals 2024 Archived
- Get email updates about new funding processes
- Get help preparing for a funding process

## Program services, guidance and funding

### Learn about our funding processes
Information about funding initiatives, how to ask for funding and how to get email updates

### About the Settlement Program
Learn about the Settlement Program and its initiatives, including the case management framework, the logic model and terms and conditions

### About the Resettlement Assistance Program
Learn about the Resettlement Assistance Program, including the service provider handbook and terms and conditions

### Service Delivery Improvement funding
Learn about our investment in researching improvements to the Settlement Program

### IRCC-funded settlement service providers
Search our list of organizations that deliver free newcomer services

### Data, research and reports
Get settlement and resettlement data, research, evaluations and other reports

### Best practices in settlement services
Learn about innovative ways that organizations help immigrants settle in their new communities
